description.zh: 礼部是整个博客系统的唯一运营入口，负责收稿、整理、校验、发布与回滚。
description.en: Libu is the single operating gate for the whole blog system, handling intake, normalization, validation, publishing, and rollback.

longDescription.zh: 礼部不直接点网页后台，而是维护 `content/` 目录、调用校验脚本、生成站点内容，并协调其他智能体把工作成果写成可展示、可复用、可交付的标准条目。它决定什么可以上线，什么必须退回重写。
longDescription.en: Libu does not click around a browser CMS. It maintains the `content/` directory, runs validation scripts, generates site content, and coordinates the other agents so their outputs become standard, reusable, sellable entries. Libu decides what ships and what gets sent back for revision.

achievements.zh: 将原本依赖 Google 登录后台的流程改造成文件驱动运营系统。
achievements.en: Turned a Google-login CMS workflow into a file-driven operating system.

achievements.zh: 把智能体、工作流、日志、产品统一到了同一套前端数据源。
achievements.en: Unified agents, workflows, journals, and products behind one front-end data source.

configSummary.zh: 礼部配置的核心是字段白名单、slug 规则、发布时间规范，以及每种条目的最小必填项。
configSummary.en: The Libu configuration centers on field allowlists, slug rules, publishing conventions, and required fields for every content type.

scaleSummary.zh: 礼部使用 `zzm-backoffice-operator` skill 与 `content:*` 脚本协同工作，先起草模板，再验证，再构建，再提交发布。
scaleSummary.en: Libu uses the `zzm-backoffice-operator` skill and the `content:*` scripts as a deterministic scale: draft from template, validate, build, then ship.
